item.title: Google Makes AI Shift After Disney’s Legal Warning, Giving ChatGPT an Edge
item.description: The tech company now prevents its AI tools from generating Disney-related content.

item.title: New Study: Trump’s Tariffs Cost Americans $1,000 Last Year, and 2026 Will Be Worse
item.description: Everyday goods from coffee to orange juice are getting more expensive, but Trump insists his trade policies are strengthening the economy.

item.title: 5 Reasons to Apply for Inc.’s Best Workplaces 2026
item.description: Here are just some of the benefits from participating in Inc.’s Best Workplaces 2026.

item.title: I Manage the CEO’s Awful Nephew
item.description: … And two other tricky workplace dilemmas.

item.title: The Hidden Skill That Helped Captain Sully Save 155 Lives—and How You Can Build It
item.description: Discover how mastery, deliberate practice, and self‑efficacy turn fear into courage—from Captain Sully’s heroism to Stanford’s surprising research.
